business.headline: Is NPS Swasthya enough for medical emergencies? Here's the realityWith rising healthcare costs, many are turning to NPS Swasthya as a safety net. But is it enough when a real emergency strikes? The answer may not be as reassuring as it sounds.

Explained: Why stock markets are rising even as crude oil remains above $100The BSE Sensex was trading at 77,334.39, up 670.18 points or 0.87%, while the NSE Nifty 50 gained 199.80 points or 0.84% to 24,097.75.

Sun Pharma's biggest-ever bet: Mega Organon deal, debt risk and global pushSun Pharma just made the biggest bet in Indian pharma history. Markets loved it instantly. Here's why investors backed the Organon deal despite the massive price tag.

Cohance Lifesciences hits 20% upper circuit: Why the stock rising today?Cohance Lifesciences jumped 20% after appointing former Cipla CEO Umang Vohra. Investors are betting his leadership can accelerate growth and transform the company's global ambitions.

Decoding Sun Pharma's $11.75 billion deal: Why the pharma stock jumped 7% today?The stock was trading around Rs 1,739.70 as of 9:46 am, up over 7%, after touching a high of Rs 1,741.85 during the session, reflecting strong investor interest following the announcement.

Paytm shares tumble 6% today: Is this dip a buying chance for investors?Paytm shares fell 6% today. Is this panic-driven weakness, or a smart chance for investors to buy into the fintech stock at lower levels now?

Sun Pharma shares jump over 7% after $11.75 billion Organon dealSun Pharma has agreed to buy Organon in an all-cash $11.75 billion deal, including debt. The takeover expands its reach in women's health and marks a sharper global push.
Sensex, Nifty jump nearly 1% in early trade: Sun Pharma up 5%The S&P BSE Sensex was up by 523.17 points to 77,187.38, while the NSE Nifty50 jumped 158.35 points to 24,056.30 as of 9:22 am.

Sensex, Nifty opening: Will stock market rise or fall today?GIFT Nifty futures were trading at 24,143.50 as of 8:15 am, indicating a gap-up opening of nearly 1% compared to Friday's close of 23,897.95.

8th Pay Commission to start talks from April 28, many unions may miss outThe 8th Pay Commission has begun consultations with unions and staff associations in Delhi. The early discussions have also sparked confusion over unofficial salary figures as employees await formal recommendations.
Are banks doing enough to keep your money safe?Digital fraud is getting smarter as AI fuels more complex scams, but are banks ready to keep your money safe in the age of instant payments?

When risk itself begins to drift: Reading the Mythos moment for Indian financeWhy Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman raised concerns about the security of our financial systems in the wake of the emergence of Mythos, should India worry, and what must it do to secure one of the world's largest digital financial stacks?

Decoding the AI threat to banks that Nirmala Sitharaman warned aboutFinance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman met bank chiefs to discuss rising AI-linked risks in the financial system. To understand how serious the threat could become, we dug deeper into the risks banks face from AI and spoke to experts across the cybersecurity and technology sectors.

RBI cancels Paytm Payments Bank licence: What it means for Paytm usersThe RBI has cancelled Paytm Payments Bank's licence after years of restrictions and scrutiny. The big question now is how this move could affect everyday Paytm users.

The many ways motor insurance is mis-sold in IndiaMotor insurance mis-selling in India is not an exception, it is part of how the system works. What customers don't know at the time of purchase often costs them the most at the time of claim.

Reliance Q4 profit slips to Rs 16,971 crore; Rs 6 dividend announcedReliance Industries posted consolidated net profit attributable to owners of Rs 16,971 crore for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, down from Rs 19,407 crore a year earlier.

RBI cancels Paytm Payments Bank licence; to seek winding up in courtThe action marks a dramatic escalation in regulatory steps against Paytm Payments Bank, which had already faced severe business restrictions over the past two years.

Is not using your credit card doing more harm than good?For many people, the safest way to avoid debt is simple, i.e., stop using credit cards altogether. No swipes, no bills, no worries. But could this seemingly smart move actually be harming your credit score?

How this 25-year old built a Rs 20 lakh portfolio in almost 3 yearsBuilding a Rs 20 lakh portfolio usually feels like a long-term goal. But a 25-year-old techie managed to do it in just about three years. The surprising part? His salary wasn't very high, so what did he do differently?

entertainment.headline: Bhooth Bangla box office Day 10: Strong Sunday boosts global total to Rs 180 crore Akshay Kumar's Bhooth Bangla added Rs 12.50 crore on Day 10, pushing its worldwide gross to Rs 179.48 crore. A strong second weekend has helped it surpass several of the actor's recent releases, despite mixed reviews.

BTS member Jung Kook apologises over technical glitch during Arirang Tampa tour BTS's Jung Kook apologised to ARMY after a brief sound glitch disrupted their Tampa performance of Magic Shop. Fans said the issue was quickly fixed and defended the group against criticism online.

Ektaa Kapoor confirms Naagin 7 finale date, says show will return next year Ektaa Kapoor has confirmed that Naagin 7 will air its final episode on her birthday. She assured fans that the show will return next year with a shorter, tighter format.

Sai Pallavi gets emotional at Ek Din event, apologises for poor Hindi At the Ek Din promotional event, Sai Pallavi delivered an emotional speech and thanked Aamir Khan and the team. Her remarks captured both her gratitude for the film and her nervousness before her first Hindi release.

Dhurandhar 2 box office Day 39: Just Rs 33 more needed to dethrone Baahubali 2 Ranveer Singh's Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge has reached Rs 1,777 crore worldwide after 39 days in theatres. The film now needs Rs 33 crore more to overtake Baahubali 2 in the list of India's highest-grossing releases.

Rihanna's Mumbai slang game is surprisingly strong, goes 'kadak' in viral video Rihanna picked up Mumbai slang and Hindi phrases during her latest visit to the city. The viral clips made her local interactions a major talking point from the Fenty Beauty launch.

F2 actor Mehreen marries arsh Aulakh in intimate ceremony. All we know about him Mehreen Pirzada married Arsh Aulakh in an intimate ceremony in Himachal Pradesh and shared the first wedding pictures on social media. Here's what we know about Arsh.

Deepika Padukone, Ranveer Singh take daughter Dua to her first show in Mumbai Ranveer Singh and Deepika Padukone took their daughter Dua to her first live show at Mumbai's NMACC. The outing drew attention days after Deepika announced that the couple are expecting their second child.

5 budding singers in India who own social media without big-label backing A new wave of independent singers is taking over social media and proving that authenticity matters more than big labels. From viral reels to chart-topping hits, here are five rising stars who have built loyal fandoms one song at a time.

Aamir Khan breaks down at event for son Junaid and Sai Pallavi's Ek Din. Video Aamir Khan turned emotional at the Mumbai musical event for Junaid Khan's upcoming film, Ek Din. The viral video drew attention as Junaid Khan and Sai Pallavi were seen beside him during the performances.

Archana Puran Singh's son loses Rs 87,000 in credit card scam. Here's what happened Archana Puran Singh's son Aayushmaan Sethi fell victim to an online credit card scam, losing Rs 87,000. His family reacted to the internet scam as he tried to contact support and dispute the payment.

Rakul Preet, Jackky Bhagnani laugh off situationship tag on marriage. Watch Actor Rakul Preet Singh posted a playful Instagram Stories video with her producer-husband Jackky Bhagnani over his 'situationship' remark. The post echoed her earlier point that one line from their interview was taken out of context.
Riteish Deshmukh slams 'distorted nonsense' about Raja Shivaji Actor Riteish Deshmukh on Sunday strongly criticised what he termed as distorted nonsense about Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj.

Selena Gomez-Benny Blanco to divorce? Here's what we know about the viral claim Viral posts have claimed Selena Gomez and Benny Blanco are heading for a divorce. Read on to know what led to the speculation about the couple, who got married on September 27, 2025.

Varun Dhawan shares 'work nobody sees' behind Wow song, celebrities react Actor Varun Dhawan shared a behind-the-scenes rehearsal video from the Wow song, which features in his upcoming film, Hai Jawaani Toh Ishq Hona Hai. The clip drew reactions from actors Jacqueline Fernandez, Maniesh Paul and choreographer Bosco Martis.

Karan Johar calls out testosterone-heavy films and Bollywood's alpha obsession Karan Johar criticised Hindi cinema's current tilt towards hyper-masculine, testosterone-heavy storytelling. He said the trend reflects Bollywood's herd mentality and recalled backlash to a scene in Rocky Aur Rani Kii Prem Kahaani.

The Devil Wears Prada 2 advance bookings open in India, paid previews set Witnessing strong early interest from fans, the advance bookings for The Devil Wears Prada 2 have started in India. The sequel starring Meryl Streep and Anne Hathaway will also have special paid previews.

13 years of Aashiqui 2: Aditya-Shraddha and Mohit Suri revisit memories Actors Aditya Roy Kapur, Shraddha Kapoor and filmmaker Mohit Suri revisited Aashiqui 2 memories on its 13th anniversary. Their posts renewed attention to a film that remains one of Bollywood's most loved romantic musicals.

Karan Johar slams Bollywood PR overdrive, says work should speak itself Filmmaker Karan Johar has slammed Bollywood's growing dependence on paid publicity and performative film promotion. He said the trend makes it harder to know whether audience approval is genuine or purchased.

general news.headline: Faith shattered: Kejriwal boycotts judge who refused to recuse in Delhi excise caseIn a letter, the AAP chief said he has lost faith in the judge's ability to deliver justice, and that he will follow Gandhi's protest path, and retains the right to approach the Supreme Court against the verdict.

Toxic workplace: Raghav Chadha explains AAP exit amid drop in Instagram followersIn his first remarks since joining the BJP, Raghav Chadha said he quit the Aam Aadmi Party after growing disillusioned with it. He said the move followed disappointment with the party's "toxic" working style and added that he would remain active in public life.

Kejriwal declares 'satyagraha' against Justice Sharma: Full text of boycott letterArvind Kejriwal has refused to appear before Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma in the excise policy case, saying he has lost faith in her and may approach the Supreme Court.

Pakistan not a suitable intermediary, says Iranian MP amid stalled talksIranian lawmaker Ebrahim Rezaei said Pakistan is not a suitable intermediary in the ongoing talks. His remarks come as Abbas Araghchi steps up diplomacy from Oman to Islamabad to keep negotiations moving.

IPL Play of the Day: Rinku Singh's got to catch 'em all at LucknowLSG vs KKR: Rinku Singh starred in every phase for KKR in Lucknow, scoring 83 not out and taking five catches, including the decisive grab in the Super Over that sealed Kolkata's dramatic win over LSG.

Killer heatwave in April: Does India need to rethink summer vacation timing for schools?With a shift in weather patterns, several states in India witness a spike in temperatures much earlier than previously recorded. This forces schools to shut down ahead of schedule. With April seeing heatwaves and turning as harsh as mid-May, there's a strong case for rethinking India's school calendar.

Harvard student makes AI tool to crack down on AI text and make it look humanA Harvard Business School student has created an anti-Grammarly tool that uses AI to add mistakes to text. It comes at a time when more people have started associating perfectly written text with AI.

Surat man kills wife, hides body in cement-filled crate, files missing reportA handwritten note found at the couple's home, allegedly written by Vishal and handed to police by their minor son, proved crucial, with a confession-like line that he had made a grave mistake and that Shilpa was no longer alive.

Deepika Padukone, Ranveer Singh take daughter Dua to her first show in MumbaiRanveer Singh and Deepika Padukone took their daughter Dua to her first live show at Mumbai's NMACC. The outing drew attention days after Deepika announced that the couple are expecting their second child.

Your traditional domestic help vs app-based house help, which one would you choose?Can hiring an app-based house help become the new normal? We spoke to several families as well as domestic workers in and around Delhi-NCR and beyond. What we found out was very interesting.

No longer willing to permit rapist...: What White House event shooter said in noteTrump, reacting to the White House shooting suspect's manifesto, dismissed the sexual violence allegations as "radicalised" rhetoric. In an interview, he slammed the media for amplifying the claims and strongly denied them, saying, "I'm not a rapist. I didn't rape anybody."

Bengaluru stadium security scare: 2 staffers cut 240 CCTV feeds on IPL match dayA major security lapse was reported during the RCB vs GT match earlier this season at the Chinnaswamy stadium in Bengaluru. Despite the breach, swift action ensured the game continued without incident.

UP school principal clashes with parents over notebooks, fees. Video goes viralA video from Hardoi's Sunbeam School shows principal Mamta Mishra confronting parent Neelam Verma over additional notebooks. The clash has led to a complaint and an official enquiry into pressure on families to buy school supplies.

Live: Netanyahu's corruption testimony cancelled before hearing due to security concernsUS-Iran War Live: Iran's Foreign Minister Syed Abbas Araghchi has reached St Petersburg for high-level discussions with Russian President Vladimir Putin, describing the visit as an opportunity to review ongoing war-related developments and regional tensions. He indicated that earlier engagements in Islamabad were constructive, with both sides examining conditions required for resuming dialogue between Iran and the US. Amid these diplomatic efforts, global energy markets have reacted, with Brent crude prices climbing over two percent as uncertainty persists around negotiations. On the ground, tensions remain elevated, with the US military maintaining pressure through a maritime blockade targeting Iranian ports, forcing dozens of vessels to change course. The wider region continues to see instability spill over, as Israeli forces carried out strikes near the entrance of Kafra, severing access routes and adding to concerns of further escalation. Catch all the live updates at indiatoday.in.

Pak military took disinfo drive to a new level with fake alerts on US-Iran talksEven though it was clear that Iran wouldn't be participating in the peace talks with the US, the Pakistani military's mouthpiece, ISPR, kept feeding false reports to journalists. The blatant disinformation, meant to project Pakistan as a peacemaker, might end up destroying any remaining Iranian trust in Islamabad's mediation efforts.

Rain and storm to hit India, bring much-needed heat relief. Here's whenA spell of dust storms, thunderstorms and scattered rain is expected across parts of India. The change could lower temperatures in rain-hit areas, though some states may continue to face heatwave conditions.

Why mirrors flip your image, and how your brain plays tricks on youYou raise your right hand and your reflection raises its left. But the top of your head still points up, and your feet still point down. Your brain is playing tricks.

Aamir Khan breaks down at event for son Junaid and Sai Pallavi's Ek Din. VideoAamir Khan turned emotional at the Mumbai musical event for Junaid Khan's upcoming film, Ek Din. The viral video drew attention as Junaid Khan and Sai Pallavi were seen beside him during the performances.
Open Hormuz now, nuclear talks later: Iran's new peace proposal to USIran, through Pakistani mediators, gave the US a new proposal on reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and the ending of the war.

Ahmedabad customs seize 61 designer pens worth up to Rs 30 lakhCustoms officials at Ahmedabad airport seized 61 premium designer pens from a passenger arriving from Japan via Vietnam. The haul, valued at up to Rs 30 lakh, has triggered questions over duty evasion and possible smuggling links.

Seven Missed Calls – Inside story of how AAP lost its Upper House in seven daysA covert political operation saw seven AAP Rajya Sabha MPs defect, blindsiding Arvind Kejriwal and strengthening BJP's numbers in Parliament, shifting the balance in the Upper House.

Rs 289 crore, 25 acres, 15 students: Inside India's 'ghost campus'Handcrafted ByOur Editors Pandit Deendayal Upadhyaya Institute of Archaeology in Greater Noida was built as one of India's premier centres for archaeology training and research, especially for education. Spread across 25 acres and built at a cost of Rs 289 crore, it was inaugurated by Prime Minister Modi in 2019. But when I visited the campus on a weekday, what I found raised more questions than answers.

Himalayan snow hits 23-year low, water crisis looms for 2 billion livesA new report has found that snow cover across the Hindu Kush Himalaya plunged 27.8 per cent below average this winter, the lowest in more than two decades.

Amid fish ban row, PM offers prayers at Kolkata Kalibari known for non-veg prasadNarendra Modi offered prayers at Kolkata's Thanthania Kalibari before his roadshow. The visit drew attention to the 300-year-old shrine's rare non-vegetarian prasad tradition and Ramakrishna link.

sports.headline: Rohan Jaitley's safety push at DDCA shines after Ngidi injury at Delhi stadium IPL 2026: Lungi Ngidi suffered an on-field injury during the IPL 2026 match between Delhi Capitals and Punjab Kings at the Arun Jaitley Stadium. The swift medical response and his stable discharge underlined the venue's focus on player safety.

Dig at CSK? Shubman Gill poses with whistle in Chennai, sparks mixed fan reactions IPL 2026, CSk vs GT: Shubman Gill's Instagram post with a CSK yellow whistle triggered a sharp reaction after Gujarat Titans beat Chennai Super Kings at Chepauk. Gill's visiting side hammered the Super Kings to move into the top-four of the points table.

Rajat Patidar raising captaincy standards at RCB: Dinesh Karthik IPL 2026: Rajat Patidar's calm leadership is shaping RCB's strong IPL 2026 run. Backed by explosive batting, he is setting the tempo on and off the field.

RCB's Tim David, Romario Shepherd play cricket in gullies of Delhi: Video DC vs RCB: Tim David and Romario Shepherd were seen playing gully cricket in Delhi before the Royal Challengers Bengaluru's match against Delhi Capitals. The light-hearted outing came ahead of a rematch that could shape RCB's title defence.

Virat Kohli's homecoming in focus as RCB look to pounce on wounded DC IPL 2026, DC vs RCB preview: Virat Kohli returns to Delhi once again with RCB as they take on a wounded and inconsistent DC side, looking to bounce back from the thrashing loss against Punjab. With the playoff race heating up, can Delhi halt RCB's momentum?

Pooran's 0, Langer's delusion: How LSG ignored stats to hand KKR a Super Over gift IPL 2026, LSG vs KKR: Lucknow Super Giants sent Nicholas Pooran to face Sunil Narine in the Super Over but managed just one run against Kolkata Knight Riders. The decision, defended by head coach Justin Langer, has drawn criticism given Pooran's underwhelming record in previous Super Overs.

IPL Play of the Day: Rinku Singh's got to catch 'em all at Lucknow LSG vs KKR: Rinku Singh starred in every phase for KKR in Lucknow, scoring 83 not out and taking five catches, including the decisive grab in the Super Over that sealed Kolkata's dramatic win over LSG.

Criminal: Dale Steyn blasts LSG for sending Nicholas Pooran in Super Over vs KKR IPL 2026, LSG vs KKR: Former South Africa speedster Dale Steyn said Lucknow Super Giants should not have used Nicholas Pooran in the Super Over against Kolkata Knight Riders, given his poor run of form.

Definitely need a break: Rishabh Pant's reaction after Super Over loss vs KKR LSG vs KKR: Rishabh Pant said Lucknow Super Giants need a break, a reset and greater accountability after their crushing Super Over defeat to Kolkata Knight Riders left them bottom of the IPL table.

Rinku Singh rescues KKR again as LSG hit rock bottom after Super Over thriller IPL 2026, LSG vs KKR: Rinku Singh scored 83 runs, took five catches and hit the winning runs in the Super Over as Kolkata Knight Riders beat the Lucknow Super Giants at the Ekana Stadium in Lucknow.

Kartik Tyagi allowed to bowl despite 2 waist-high full tosses: ExplainedKartik Tyagi bowled 2 waist-high full tosses in the final over of Lucknow vs Kolkata. However, he was allowed to continue with his over. Here's why?

Shubman Gill unhappy with Gujarat Titans despite big win vs CSKGujarat Titans captain Shubman Gill was not happy with his team despite a big win against Chennai Super Kings. Gill said that the team needed to close out innings better with the ball.

Self-belief, small tweaks: How Deepti Sharma bounced back to silence criticsSAW vs INDW, 4th T20I: Deepti Sharma bounced back to form and silenced her critics, finishing with figures of 4-0-19-5 to help India beat South Africa by 14 runs on Saturday in Johannesburg.

MS Dhoni injured again? CSK head coach explains why he did not play vs GTIPL 2026: Stephen Fleming highlighted that MS Dhoni's calf injury resurfaced during their warm-up game. CSK are looking to play it safe so that the injury does not rule him out of the season.

Unpredictable Chepauk pitch digs CSK's grave in ChennaiChennai Super Kings faltered at home against Gujarat Titans in a day-game on Sunday, April 26. An unpredictable pitch turned out to be the downfall for CSK, who simply did not score enough runs against Shubman Gill's Gujarat.

Frustrated CSK fans leave Chepauk early after poor show during clash against GTIPL 2026, CSK vs GT: Chennai Super Kings slumped to an eight-wicket defeat against Gujarat Titans at Chepauk, with frustrated fans leaving early as Sai Sudharsan's blistering knock sealed the chase.

Angkrish Raghuvanshi run-out controversy: Was it out or not out?LSG vs KKR: Kolkata Knight Riders were left fuming after the TV umpire gave Angkrish Raghuvanshi run-out for obstructing the field. KKR coaches Shane Watson and Abhishek Nayar were seen arguing with the umpire after their batter was given out for obstructing the field.

Mayank Yadav return to IPL lasts one game. Pacer dropped after conceding 60 runsLSG vs KKR, IPL 2026: Mayank Yadav was benched by the Lucknow Super Giants despite the pacer making his return to the side after a long injury spell.

LSG vs KKR Highlights: Rinku shines in Lucknow as Kolkata win Super OverLucknow (LSG) vs Kolkata (KKR) Highlights, IPL 2026: Rinku Singh completes the job for Kolkata Knight Riders as he hits the boundary to wrap up this game. KKR win the Super Over.

Indian badminton legend's response to new scoring system: Had feared for worseBadminton as we know, is set to change after the world federation approved a change in the scoring system. From 3 games of 21 points, it's shifting to 3 games of 15. Indian badminton legend Pullela Gopichand had issued a warning about the same a few months back.

Gujarat Titans or Pakistan? Rashid Khan, Manav Suthar make comical error vs CSKIPL 2026, CSK vs GT: Rashid Khan and Manav Suthar made a comical error at the Chepauk on Sunday, gifting Kartik Sharma a boundary, echoing Pakistan's infamous 2008 fielding blunder against the West Indies.

Miracle: Kenya's Sawe becomes first man to run a marathon in under 2 hoursSabastian Sawe shattered the marathon world record in London, becoming the first man to run a legal sub-two-hour marathon with a stunning 1:59:30 finish on a historic day.

Ashwin reveals Vaibhav Sooryavanshi mania at home: My parents are his No.1 fansR Ashwin said Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's surge has made his parents the Rajasthan Royals opener's biggest fans. He said the batter's appeal lies in how strongly he resembles India's street-cricket dream.

Ishowspeed sends shoutout to Virat Kohli, trolls Babar Azam in viral videoYouTuber IShowSpeed went viral after praising Virat Kohli and taking a playful swipe at Babar Azam while playing cricket in Trinidad during his latest trip. Speed has been known to be an ardent fan of Kohli.

Why is MS Dhoni not playing? CSK fans enraged as Thala misses 8th IPL 2026 gameMS Dhoni missed his eighth game of IPL 2026 as Chennai Super Kings faced Gujarat Titans at Chepauk. The lack of any clear update from the franchise or captain Ruturaj Gaikwad fuelled fan anger and retirement speculation.

A dangerous virus that doesn't catch spreads in IPL 2026IPL 2026: The catching efficiency in the Indian Premier League has consistently gone down since 2020. It seems to have hit rock bottom in IPL 2026 where, every single day, several important chances are going down every single game. The question is, in the age of hyper-athleticism, why are so many catches being dropped in this high-profile tournament?

Trust in Shreyas Iyer influenced PBKS IPL auction calls: Coach Ricky PontingIPL 2025: Ricky Ponting said Shreyas Iyer justified Punjab Kings' big auction push with a match-winning unbeaten 71 in the record chase against Delhi Capitals. Calm under pressure, he turned a daunting chase into a statement win.

I know your secrets, go easy on my team: Kishan's funny chat with SooryavanshiIshan Kishan said he told Vaibhav Sooryavanshi jokingly to go easy on Sunrisers Hyderabad because he knew all his secrets. Sooryavanshi scored his second IPL hundred against Hyderabad during the match on April 25.

Meet Robin Singh, the Bhojpuri commentator who is giving Bihar cricket its voiceFrom dusty fields to floodlit stadiums, Bihar's cricketing voice is finally being heard. Robin Singh, a coach-turned Bhojpuri commentator, who first built cricketers in silence and now tells their stories to millions.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
